TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] BWH-HQ-VONE Memory: Physical Memory (SNMP Memory) Down (10 % (Percent Available Memory) is below the error limit of 10 % in Percent Available Memory)
TimeEntry.Notes: This was PRTG alert that physical memory sensor has down on BWH-HQ-VONE. I took the remote access of this machine and checked the memory utilization. It was normal so I restarted the SNMP service. I l

TimeEntry.Title: SNMP setup BWH-HQ-LT-05 and BWWS028
TimeEntry.Notes: While setting up OPS Manager networking, I observed that SNMP had not yet been installed on BWH-HQ-LT-05 and BWWS028. I remotely accessed these machines and installed SNMP using PowerShell. Additional

TimeEntry.Title: SNMP setup on BWH-HQ-LT-05
TimeEntry.Notes: While setting up the OPS manager I noticed that SNMP pending for installation on BWH-HQ-LT-05 computer. I took the remote access of this machine from backstage and installed the SNMP through PowerShel

TimeEntry.Title: FS01 has not been patched for past 14 days and vulnerable
TimeEntry.Notes: FS01 had not been patched for the past 14 days, which led me to manually patch and repair the agent. I then pushed the patch from Myrmm, and now it is syncing properly and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: RA01 has not been patched for past 14 days and vulnerable
